hero.title:
The knowledge engine
for enterprise
hero.subtitle: Purpose-built for retrieval-augmented generation. Designed for production workloads at scale.

deep.title: Deep understanding
deep.description: Layout-aware parsing with table extraction, intelligent chunking, and multi-format support across 50+ document types.

enterprise.title: Enterprise ready
enterprise.description: Role-based access, audit logging, SSO integration, and compliance-ready deployment from day one.

multiModel.title: Multi-model orchestration
multiModel.description: Route across OpenAI, Anthropic, local LLMs, and custom models with automatic failover and load balancing.

ingest.label: Ingest
ingest.title:
Turn any document
into knowledge
ingest.description: Bring in PDFs, Word documents, spreadsheets, web pages, and databases. KnowFlow parses them with layout recognition, extracts tables, and builds structured chunks ready for retrieval.

retrieve.label: Retrieve
retrieve.title:
Find the right answer,
not just keywords
retrieve.description: Hybrid search combines dense vector retrieval with keyword matching and re-ranking. Get precise, contextual answers from your knowledge base — not just document links.

orchestrate.label: Orchestrate
orchestrate.title:
One interface,
every model
orchestrate.description: Connect any LLM — cloud or local. KnowFlow routes queries to the right model based on cost, latency, and capability, with automatic failover across providers.

deploy.label: Deploy
deploy.title:
Ship to production
with confidence
deploy.description: Deploy on-premise, private cloud, or hybrid. Docker and Kubernetes native. Air-gapped environment support. Enterprise SLA with 99.9% uptime guarantee.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. All plans include core RAG capabilities.

free.name: Community
free.description: For individual developers and small teams

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For large organizations with specific needs

social.poweredBy: Built on RAGFlow — the most starred open-source RAG engine

testimonials.quote: KnowFlow transformed how our team accesses internal knowledge. Retrieval accuracy is unmatched.
testimonials.name: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: We evaluated every RAG platform on the market. KnowFlow's document parsing is in a league of its own.
testimonials.name: Marcus Weber

testimonials.quote: Deployment was seamless. Air-gapped support was the deciding factor for our compliance team.
testimonials.name: Yuki Tanaka

contact.title: Book a Demo
contact.subtitle: See KnowFlow AI in action. Our team will walk you through a personalized demo.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.message: Tell us about your use case
contact.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.

footer.description: Enterprise-grade RAG engine for intelligent knowledge management.

portal.manageDesc: Manage your KnowFlow AI licenses and activations.
portal.noLicenses: No licenses yet. Purchase your first license to get started.
portal.myLicensesDesc: View and manage your KnowFlow AI license keys.
portal.licenseActivationDesc: Activate your KnowFlow AI license on a new machine.
portal.step1Desc: Choose which license you want to activate on a new machine.
portal.step2Desc: Run the KnowFlow CLI on your target machine and paste the generated request code below.
portal.step3Desc: Copy this code and paste it into the KnowFlow CLI to complete activation.
portal.requestCodePlaceholder: Paste your activation request code here...
portal.noActiveLicenses: No active licenses found. Purchase a license first.
portal.settingsDesc: Manage your account and organization preferences.
portal.profileDesc: Your personal information. Email and authentication are managed through Clerk.
portal.profileNote: Profile information is managed through your Clerk account. Click the avatar in the sidebar to update your profile.
portal.companyInfoDesc: Organization details for license invoicing and certificates.
portal.billingDesc: View your billing history and manage payment methods.

admin.issueLicenseDesc: Manually create and sign a license for a customer.
admin.createCustomerDesc: Add a new customer to issue licenses for.
admin.name: Name
admin.activationRequestHint: If provided, generates a machine-bound KnowFlow license key.
admin.resultPlaceholder: Fill in the form and click "Issue License" to generate keys.
admin.sendToCustomer: Send this key to the customer.
admin.noRequestProvided: No activation request provided. The customer needs to generate one from their KnowFlow admin panel first.
